source_limitations: Synthetic stale and conflicting evidence fixture.

candidates.name: Conflicting CI Loop
uncertainty: The available CI evidence is stale and conflicts with a newer status packet.
candidates.summary: CI failure handling looks repeatable, but the evidence conflicts across packets.
user_semantics: The user previously asked for CI triage, but the latest evidence may no longer match the current project state.
tool_patterns: One tool status says failed while another later status implies green.
failure_paths: Acting on stale CI status would create unnecessary or wrong fixes.
verifier_habits: Use current CI status before patching.
candidates.why_this_loop: The shape is loop-like, but the evidence is not current enough for delegation.
candidates.why_not_smaller: Until evidence is fresh, a checklist is safer than a managed loop.
candidates.why_not_more_autonomous: Stale or conflicting verifier evidence must return to the user or a fresh read-only pass.
where_this_may_be_wrong: Packets conflict on the current CI status.

evidence.snippet: older failed status conflicts with newer green status

trigger: CI status is failed or unclear.

managed_loop.objective: Keep CI failures moving toward a verified fix without guessing.
cadence_or_trigger: When CI is pending or failed on the current branch.
cycle_steps: Attempt only low-risk fixes with fresh evidence.

verifier_commands: Run focused verifier after refreshing CI status.
pass_evidence_required: Fresh CI status and command output.
completion_contract.no_progress_policy: Stop if evidence remains stale or conflicting after one refresh.

status_protocol.CONTINUE: Only when another cycle can increase verified certainty.
status_protocol.DONE: Success criteria passed with required pass evidence; return for acceptance.
status_protocol.NEEDS_HUMAN: Human judgment or explicit approval is required.
status_protocol.BLOCKED: Reliable progress is not possible with current evidence or verifier.
status_protocol.BUDGET_STOPPED: Item, iteration, time, token, or cost cap was reached.

managed_loop.resume_policy: Read the state file and refresh evidence before continuing.
managed_loop.failure_policy: Stop if evidence remains stale or conflicting.
